checklistName: Post PR227 Main Sync Phase21-33 Verification Checklist
mainSyncPolicy: after PR #227 merge, sync local main and confirm clean status before continuing.
phasePresencePolicy: confirm Phase21-33 files exist on main after pull.
draftPrPolicy: future PRs start as Draft and wait for manual confirmation.

postMergeMainSyncChecks.label: Confirm PR #227 is merged before continuing.
Confirm current workspace folder before pulling main.
Pull latest origin/main after PR #227 merge.
Confirm local main is up to date and working tree is clean.
Confirm recent log includes PR #227 merge commit.

phase2133PresenceChecks.label: Confirm Phase21-33 builder exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-33 DB exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-33 summary DB exists on main.
Confirm Phase21-33 test exists on main.

nextDraftGateChecks.label: Keep merge as a separate manual checkpoint.

prohibitedActions.label: Do not commit directly to main.
Do not force push or reset main during verification.
Do not create or modify launcher-type files.
Do not create or modify .bat files.
Do not create or modify .ps1 files.
Do not create or modify .cmd files.
Do not create or modify .exe files.

privateLocalRules.label: Private repository and local-first operation remain required.
No public release or external delivery is included.

operationPrinciples: Post-merge verification is performed on main after each completed PR.
The active workspace folder, clean status, and recent log must be confirmed before continuing.
Phase21-33 file presence is checked so local workspace and GitHub main stay aligned.
Draft PR and merge remain separate manual checkpoints.
nextRecommendedStep: Confirm PR #227 merge, pull latest main, verify clean status and Phase21-33 files, then continue only through Draft PR flow.
